Skip to contents
HMMSSFGenerativeRepair 0.1.0
    • Generative validation
    • Generative validation for HMM-SSF models
    • Zebra model comparison with Markov generation
  • Reference

Package index

Main workflow

diagnose_hmmssf()
Diagnose HMM-SSF generative simulations
diagnose_hmmssf_simulations()
Diagnose precomputed HMM-SSF simulations
simulate_generative_hmmssf()
Simulate complete trajectories from a fitted HMM-SSF-like model
plot(<gmov_hmmssf_diagnostics>)
Plot HMM-SSF diagnostics
interpret_hmmssf_diagnostics()
Interpret HMM-SSF diagnostic rows
compare_simulation_methods()
Compare simulation methods

Simulation strategies

simulate_markov_states()
Simulate Markov state sequences
simulate_viterbi_states()
Return a fixed Viterbi state path
simulate_viterbi_tube_states()
Sample state paths inside an epsilon Viterbi tube
simulate_posterior_states()
Sample posterior state paths with FFBS
simulate_posterior_states_from_components()
FFBS from explicit HMM components
simulate_step_from_state()
Simulate one candidate step from a state-specific SSF kernel

Adapters

as_gmov_hmmssf()
Adapt fitted HMM-SSF objects to the gmov HMM-SSF interface
validate_hmmssf_adapter()
Validate an adapted HMM-SSF object
extract_hmmssf_parameters()
Extract HMM-SSF parameters
extract_initial_distribution()
Extract the initial distribution
extract_transition_probabilities()
Extract transition probabilities
extract_viterbi_path()
Extract Viterbi path
extract_state_likelihoods()
Extract state likelihoods
extract_state_specific_kernels()
Extract state-specific movement kernels

Diagnostics

diagnostic_state_occupancy()
Compute state occupancy diagnostics
diagnostic_state_residence_time()
Compute residence-time diagnostics
diagnostic_switching_rate()
Compute switching-rate diagnostics
diagnostic_transition_counts()
Compute transition-count diagnostics
compute_sharpness_scalar()
Compute sharpness for scalar diagnostics
compute_sharpness_curve()
Compute sharpness for curve diagnostics
compute_sharpness_distribution()
Compute sharpness for distribution diagnostics
classify_sharpness()
Classify sharpness

Example data

example_hmmssf_list()
Create a small simulated generic HMM-SSF-like object

On this page

Developed by Aurelien Nicosia.
